textByHash.b300dd3d4742a4f1853925f777b8260cf076f9bd: It's that fountain thingy in the temple to the east. It's turned them all into zombies.
textByHash.a4b65de7df8394fe34ee9494655b45eeb08ea65b: None at all, mate, except that those worshippers at that temple keep comin' and killin' 'em all for their bones. Don't ask me why.
textByHash.03a52f55755fba03b7b23b05b6b7004f6d518286: I don't know nuthin' about nuthin'. Oim a simple ghost with simple needs. All I know is, years ago, that temple started glowing green and, a few months later, I woke up dead. That's all there is to it.
textByHash.2f9a46c658f71ab534d0b952230bca34a6dc996e: I do miss the wife though; tell 'er I still loves her.
textByHash.1509f8230af23a54f897a11f638aa810b38a36cd: Talk to my wife and I'll think about it.
textByHash.2fb2415cc5fc7531aec6c3c8eda9afe12f26fd6e: 'Ave you talked to my wife for me?
textByHash.ff908b3b9a4c48e799cb9e9aac4a770a40d845d5: Tell 'er I spent it on cheap spirits, har har.
textByHash.4b24b371187b103976ae8873cdff2eae41e2747b: Hah, just trying to lift your spirits.
textByHash.f09a7fa1cf63f3fdfc6482d9379c61028174dcab: Suit yerself, stick-in-the-mud. Anyway, Oim not one o' them yokels. Tell 'er I putted the cash in the bank like she always told me to.
textByHash.dc9fcdeae6c974ee73d099600a461c0696622052: A warning to ya, too: annoy her and I'll haunt ya till yer hair turns white.
textByHash.684b526d6fcfd2dee41bb5afb9487e735db53927: Maybe she said that, maybe she didn't. I think you're just after me savings. Tell 'er that no one but a fool gives away their pass numbers.
textByHash.79d46512103cf64be99d902cdf16b8899caac740: Go tell 'er now, if you're not a double-dealin' scammer, that is.
textByHash.1e632d6483a0cd851891d8582c2c9f0bcecb2da4: Arr, that makes far more sense than I was expecting from a muscle-head like you. My wife's a clever one.
textByHash.a0259fcd0537f3a4d5585f8db5bc2c132d8bb99e: Give me that amulet, then, and we'll be seeing about your unnatural desire for chickens.
textByHash.1183abbae7fb372448ca79703341cca11f4fc454: Ahhh, many thanks. Now what was it you were wanting again?
textByHash.b9889215a5fdef225e85ae04ab22b7af3d757443: Chickens is tricksy, 'specially dead 'uns. I'll have to catch 'em for ye.
textByHash.0cb3cd302c403969714c7f8630fc5765526de8b3: Stand back while I catches 'em, ya city slicker.
textByHash.5ac87652ebef7e963c6fd1556a4ba6795434742c: Hello, how can I help you? I'm sellin' if you have ecto- tokens.
textByHash.261636945a01b885cc17330a073e6c4f19775bfc: I can hand over a chicken if you give me 10 of them ecto-token thingies per bird.
textByHash.2893ace84314d29bcf6c2bfd2d021a2b44d97449: Ta, some day soon I'll be havin' a nice undead bed to kip in.
textByHash.85839c7ac6b553f9e0deb66b001d7ca077599590: Great! I'm laying away me tokens for some killer cows. That'll learn them bone rustlers.
textByHash.eb1a9e3354be0c1c0420c796ef48d810cc68754c: Har har, how many ghost chicky farmers d'you know, den?
textByHash.5e36e1f08878e650522c6c55a92ea82e557af3e4: The ghosts I talk to say that the tokens have something to do with the tower just east of here. If you need to collect some I'd try there.
